'''Talfaglio''' was a reddish-orange [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

It was located in [[Talfaglio system/Legends|Talfaglio system]], the least-populated section of the Corellian sector, this planet was where [[Human League]] agent [[Pharnis Gleasry]] was able to meet [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and give her a message cube from [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] for [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]].

It was the site of a [[Operation Safe Passage|battle]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}}
